mapper.insert: INSERT INTO virtual_user_stats (user_id, total_gen_count, fail_gen_count, last_gen_time) SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total_gen_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_gen_count, MAX(create_time) AS last_gen_time FROM ai_video_task WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY user_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_gen_count = VALUES(total_gen_count), fail_gen_count = VALUES(fail_gen_count), last_gen_time = VALUES(last_gen_time), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO virtual_user_stats (user_id, total_gen_count, fail_gen_count, last_gen_time) VALUES (#{userId}, 1, 0, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_gen_count = total_gen_count + 1, last_gen_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO virtual_user_stats (user_id, total_gen_count, fail_gen_count, last_gen_time) VALUES (#{userId}, 1, 1, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_gen_count = total_gen_count + 1, fail_gen_count = fail_gen_count + 1, last_gen_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()
